item.title: Amish White Bread: A Soft, Classic Loaf with a Golden Crust
item.description: This Amish White Bread is a soft, fluffy loaf with a perfectly golden crust. The secret? A slow rise and a touch of sugar for just the right sweetness. Great for sandwiches or toast any time!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup warm water (110°F/43°C)
  • 2 tablespoons granulated sugar
  • 2 1/4 teaspoons active dry yeast (1 packet)
  • 3 cups all-purpose flour, plus extra for kneading
  • 1 teaspoon salt
  • 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted and cooled
  • 1/2 cup milk, warmed

item.title: Soft Carrot Cake Cinnamon Rolls That Melt in Your Mouth
item.description: These carrot cake cinnamon rolls are incredibly tender and packed with warm spices and shredded carrots. The cream cheese frosting adds a tangy finish that’s perfect for brunch or a cozy weekend treat.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 45 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 8

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 1/4 teaspoons active dry yeast (1 packet)
  • 1 cup warm whole milk (about 110°F)
  • 1/2 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/3 cup unsalted butter, melted
  • 2 large eggs
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • 3 cups all-purpose flour
  • 1/2 teaspoon salt
  • 1 1/2 teaspoons ground cinnamon
  • 1/2 teaspoon ground nutmeg
  • 1 1/2 cups finely shredded carrots
  • 1/2 cup brown sugar
  • 1/3 cup unsalted butter, softened
  • 4 oz cream cheese, softened
  • 1 cup powdered sugar
  • 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Mango Flan Cake: A Tropical Twist on Classic Custard Dessert
item.description: This mango flan cake combines silky custard with fresh mango slices and a luscious caramel base. The secret? Baking it in a water bath for that perfect creamy texture. Serve it chilled for a refreshing tropical treat anytime!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 50 minutes

⏰ Total Time: 65 minutes

🍽️ Servings: 6

📊 Difficulty: Medium

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 ripe mangoes, peeled and sliced
  • 1 cup granulated sugar
  • 1/4 cup water
  • 3 large eggs
  • 1 can (400 ml) sweetened condensed milk
  • 1 cup whole milk
  • 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Optional: whipped cream or soft cake base for serving
